---
title: "Querying with dbplyr"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(dbplyr)
library(duckdb)

conn <- DBI::dbConnect(duckdb::duckdb(),
                       dbdir = "halibut.db")

DBI::dbListTables(conn)
```

```{r}
halibut_db <- tbl(conn, "Halibut")
halibut_db
```

```{r}
trawl_db <- tbl(conn, "Trawl")
trawl_db
```

```{r}
site_db <- tbl(conn, "Site")
site_db
```

```{r}
species_db <- tbl(conn, "Species")
species_db
```
```{r}
halibut_length <- halibut_db %>% 
  inner_join(trawl_db) %>% 
  left_join(site_db, by = join_by(loc == location_abbreviation)) %>% 
  filter(loc != "LH" & loc != "T" & loc != "HB" & loc != "M") %>% 
  collect()
```

```{r}
halibut_length %>% 
  group_by(location, season) %>% 
  mutate(avg_length = mean(halibut_total_length_mm)) %>% 
  mutate(location = reorder(location, avg_length)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(halibut_total_length_mm, location)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_light()
```



```{r}
av_hal_catch <- trawl_db %>% 
  left_join(site_db, by = join_by(loc == location_abbreviation)) %>% 
  filter(loc != "V") %>% 
  group_by(location) %>% 
  summarize(av_hal = mean(halibut_100m2)) %>% 
  arrange(desc(av_hal)) %>% 
  collect()
```

```{r}
av_hal_catch %>% 
  arrange(desc(av_hal)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(location, av_hal)) +
  geom_col()
```
```{r}
sp_count <- species_db %>% 
  inner_join(trawl_db) %>% 
  left_join(site_db, by = join_by(loc == location_abbreviation)) %>% 
  filter(loc != "LH" & loc != "T" & loc != "HB" & loc != "M") %>% 
  collect()
```

```{r}


sp_count %>% 
  filter(loc != "SO" & loc != "DH" & loc != "V" & season != "Summer") %>%
  group_by(season, location) %>% 
  summarize(total_species = mean(length(unique(common_name))),
            most_south = min(starting_lat)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(total_species, location)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = season), position = "dodge") +
  theme_light()
  
```


```{r}
DBI::dbDisconnect(conn, shutdown = TRUE)
```
